channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Goldilocks economy, if you don't look too close
item.description: The U.S. economy started 2026 in a state of excellent balance: strong growth, a solid job market and subdued inflation . Just don't look too closely. ...

item.title: Fragmenting Latino vote now a wildcard in elections
item.description: Latino voters aren't realigning — they're fragmenting. Consultants and pollsters tell Axios that after moving toward Donald Trump in 2024, the nation'...

item.title: Gold and silver price swings are reshaping Valentine's Day jewelry
item.description: Valentine's Day jewelry is quietly changing as higher metal prices push brands to rethink materials and price points. Why it matters: This holiday cou...

item.title: Casey Wasserman selling his agency amid Epstein controversy
item.description: Casey Wasserman, the veteran Hollywood talent agent who also chairs the LA28 Olympic committee, is selling his agency amid a growing controversy over ...

item.title: Trump vowed to boost Black business. Critics say he's failed so far
item.description: President Trump promised economic relief for Black businesses and workers, but so far, analysts say his second-term policies have put them under great...

item.title: Rubio says U.S., Europe ‘belong together,’ despite rifts over Trump policies
item.description: At the Munich Security Conference, the secretary of state stressed cultural and historical ties but also slammed European trade and border policies an...

item.title: Golfers sue Trump administration over public course takeover in D.C.
item.description: Some area golfers say the president’s ambitions for East Potomac Golf Links could put low-cost entry points to the game out of reach.

item.title: White House, RFK Jr. shake up health leadership after controversies
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s health department is undergoing a major leadership overhaul.

item.title: Republicans see a big opportunity in crowded Democratic primaries
item.description: In several states and swing districts, House Democrats have nomination contests that could prove harmful.

item.title: Much of DHS runs out of money after ICE negotiations falter
item.description: Democrats refused to fund the department without new restrictions on federal immigrations agents.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trump’s economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
